hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -e '.file_path | endswith("GRAPH_REPORT.md")' >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md ]; then mkdir -p .claude && stat -f %m graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md > .claude/.graphify_read 2>/dev/null || stat -c %Y graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md > .claude/.graphify_read; fi

[ -f .claude/.graphify_skip ] && exit 0; if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -e '.subagent_type == "Explore"' >/dev/null 2>&1; then if [ ! -f .claude/.graphify_read ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md first. Use: Read tool on that file."}'; elif [ -f graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md ]; then current=$(stat -f %m graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md 2>/dev/null || stat -c %Y graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md); read_at=$(cat .claude/.graphify_read); [ "$current" != "$read_at" ] && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"GRAPH_REPORT.md changed since last read. Re-read it."}'; fi; fi
